seo.title: 10 Best Hotels in Lampang 2026 — Budget to Boutique
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotel in Lampang for your budget. Our 2026 guide covers 11 top-rated properties from riverside guesthouses to Lanna boutique resorts — with real prices, locations and honest tips.

intro: Lampang is one of Thailand's most affordable cities for accommodation — even the best properties rarely exceed 2,500 THB per night. Hotels cluster in three areas: the city centre (convenient for temples, restaurants and Kad Kong Ta), the riverside (atmospheric setting along the Wang River), and the highway corridor between town and the Elephant Conservation Center. As a smaller, less touristy city than Chiang Mai, Lampang offers exceptional value — boutique-quality stays at mid-range prices. Most visitors spend two to three nights, which is enough to cover the city, the Elephant Center and a day trip north. Below are 11 properties across budget, mid-range and boutique categories with real 2025/2026 prices.

hotels.name: Khelangnakorn Hotel
hotels.description: A long-standing Lampang institution and one of the best-value budget hotels in northern Thailand. Khelangnakorn Hotel offers clean, spacious air-conditioned rooms with hot water at prices that have barely changed in years. The central location puts you within walking distance of Baan Sao Nak, the riverside and most city centre temples. The hotel is no-frills but well-maintained, and the helpful front desk can arrange transport to outlying attractions.
highlights: Unbeatable value — large A/C rooms from 350 THB
Central location near temples and restaurants
On-site parking for those with rental cars or motorbikes
Helpful staff who can arrange transport to the Elephant Center
Walking distance to Kad Kong Ta walking street

hotels.name: Baan Chiang Bed Lampang
hotels.description: A modern, well-designed budget hotel that punches above its weight. Baan Chiang Bed offers compact but thoughtfully furnished rooms with quality mattresses, clean bathrooms and a minimalist aesthetic that would not look out of place at twice the price. The property is well-reviewed for cleanliness and friendly service. Located on Bandongpattana Road, it is a short walk to the Old Town and the main shopping areas.
highlights: Modern design and excellent cleanliness at budget prices
Quality mattresses — rare at this price point
Free Wi-Fi throughout the property
Friendly, attentive staff
Short walk to Old Town attractions and restaurants

hotels.name: The Riverside Guest House
hotels.description: A charming wooden guesthouse on the banks of the Wang River, The Riverside Guest House has been a traveller favourite for years. Simple but atmospheric rooms overlook the river, and the communal terrace is perfect for watching sunset over the water while swapping stories with other guests. The location along the river near Kad Kong Ta is ideal for weekend market evenings. The owner is a font of local knowledge and can help arrange day trips.
highlights: Atmospheric riverside location with river-view rooms
Communal terrace overlooking the Wang River
Walking distance to Kad Kong Ta walking street
Knowledgeable owner helps with local tips and transport
Charming traditional wooden building

hotels.name: C2 Residence Boutique Hotel
hotels.description: A modern boutique-style hotel offering clean, contemporary rooms at genuine budget prices. C2 Residence combines the style of a boutique property with the affordability of a guesthouse. Rooms are compact but well-appointed with quality bedding, modern bathrooms and air conditioning. The central location makes it easy to walk to most city attractions, and the rooftop area offers views over the city to the surrounding mountains.
highlights: Boutique style at budget prices
Modern rooms with quality furnishings
Central location for walking to attractions
Free Wi-Fi and good A/C
Rooftop area with city views

hotels.name: Wienglakor Hotel
hotels.description: The most established mid-range hotel in Lampang, Wienglakor offers 100 well-maintained rooms with all the amenities expected at this level: swimming pool, on-site restaurant, fitness centre and meeting facilities. The hotel has been a Lampang institution for years and delivers reliable, comfortable accommodation with professional service. Its central location makes it a solid base for exploring the city, and the pool is a welcome bonus after hot days of temple-hopping.
highlights: Swimming pool — a major plus in Lampang's hot climate
100 rooms with minibar and complimentary water
On-site restaurant serving Thai and international cuisine
Central location with easy access to attractions
Professional service and reliable quality

hotels.name: The Coconut Hotel
hotels.description: A well-regarded 3-star hotel with a modern tropical vibe that has earned strong reviews for its cleanliness and friendly service. The Coconut Hotel offers spacious rooms with contemporary furnishings, good bedding and reliable hot water. The on-site cafe serves decent Thai and Western breakfast, and the overall atmosphere is relaxed and welcoming. A good choice for travellers who want comfort without the formality of a larger hotel.
highlights: Modern tropical design with a relaxed atmosphere
Spacious rooms with comfortable beds
On-site cafe with breakfast options
Excellent cleanliness standards
Friendly, helpful staff

hotels.name: Pin Hotel Lampang
hotels.description: A modern, well-designed hotel that brings a touch of urban sophistication to Lampang. Pin Hotel offers clean, contemporary rooms with smart design touches, quality amenities and efficient service. The hotel caters to both business and leisure travellers, with a convenient city centre location and on-site dining. The overall presentation and service level exceed what you would expect for the price in a city of Lampang's size.
highlights: Contemporary design with smart room layouts
Quality amenities and good bathrooms
Central location near shopping and dining
On-site restaurant and parking
Good value for the quality offered

hotels.name: The Space Hotel Lampang
hotels.description: A modern 3-star hotel designed with business travellers in mind but equally suitable for tourists. The Space Hotel features a 24-hour business centre, meeting rooms and efficient service, alongside comfortable rooms with all modern amenities. Its central location provides easy access to both attractions and practical services. The clean, professional atmosphere makes it a reliable choice in a city with limited hotel options.
highlights: Modern facilities with 24-hour business centre
Central location for easy access to attractions
Clean, comfortable rooms with modern amenities
On-site parking
Efficient, professional service

sources.sourceName: Asiatica Travel — Best Hotels in Lampang

hotels.name: Auangkham Resort
hotels.description: A charming Lanna-style boutique resort with just 14 rooms, set in a peaceful garden compound in the old part of town. Auangkham Resort captures the essence of traditional Lampang hospitality — warm, personal and unhurried. The rooms blend Lanna architectural touches with modern comfort, and the lush garden setting provides a tranquil retreat from the city. The small scale means personal attention from staff who genuinely know and love Lampang. One of the most atmospheric places to stay in the city.
highlights: Intimate 14-room Lanna-style resort
Beautiful garden setting in the Old Town area
Personal, attentive service from knowledgeable staff
Traditional Lanna architecture with modern comforts
Walking distance to Old Town temples and river

hotels.name: Lampang River Lodge
hotels.description: Lampang's most upscale accommodation option, set in lush tropical gardens on the banks of the Wang River. The 60-room resort offers a peaceful riverside retreat with a swimming pool, spa, well-regarded restaurant and beautifully landscaped grounds. Rooms feature traditional Lanna decor with all modern amenities. While located 10 km from the city centre, the serene riverside setting and resort facilities make it a destination in itself. The hotel restaurant serves excellent northern Thai cuisine with river views.
highlights: Riverside location with lush tropical gardens
Swimming pool and spa facilities
60 rooms with Lanna-style decor
Excellent on-site restaurant with river views
Peaceful, resort-like atmosphere away from the city

hotels.name: Karpenter Lampang
hotels.description: A trendy boutique hotel that blends industrial-chic design with Lampang's timber heritage. Karpenter (a playful nod to the city's carpentry and teak traditions) offers stylish rooms with exposed brick, reclaimed wood accents and modern amenities. The attached cafe is popular with both guests and locals, serving specialty coffee and light meals. The overall vibe is creative and contemporary — a refreshing contrast to the traditional Lanna aesthetic of most Lampang properties.
highlights: Industrial-chic design inspired by Lampang's timber heritage
Popular on-site cafe with specialty coffee
Stylish rooms with exposed brick and reclaimed wood
Central Old Town location
Creative, contemporary atmosphere
